description: Minimal MCP server for Google Drive file management and Google Sheets editing.
name: io.github.zayansalman/google-drive-files-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Path to the Google OAuth client secret JSON. Default: $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/google-drive-files-mcp/credentials.json.
environmentVariables.name: GDRIVE_FILES_MCP_CREDENTIALS

environmentVariables.description: Path to the cached Google OAuth refresh token. Default: $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/google-drive-files-mcp/token.json.
environmentVariables.name: GDRIVE_FILES_MCP_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated Google OAuth scopes. Default: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive (full, required to move files).
environmentVariables.name: GDRIVE_FILES_MCP_SCOPES

packageArguments.description: Subcommand that runs the stdio MCP server.
